programs.name: 2 Week Campus Program
programs.short_label: Full 2-week program - one track, all classes included
programs.description: A focused two-week LPU campus journey where students pick one track, learn with mentors six days a week, build real outcomes, and present their best work in a grand showcase.
programs.cta_context: For students ready to learn by doing inside a vibrant university campus.
programs.seats_note: Final seats moving fast. Register today.

programs.name: Online Course
programs.description: A flexible online learning track for students who want guided skill-building from home with structured lessons, mentor touchpoints, and practical outcomes.
programs.cta_context: For learners who need remote access without losing the rhythm of a guided summer program.
programs.seats_note: Dates, pricing, and seats will be announced with the online schedule.

programs.name: LPU Staff Kid Summer Camp
programs.description: A lively campus summer camp for LPU staff children, blending learning, creativity, sports, friendships, and supervised experiences across the university ecosystem.
programs.cta_context: For LPU families looking for a meaningful, active, and well-supported summer experience.
programs.seats_note: Limited camp seats for staff children.

programs.name: Tailor-Made Skills : AEROBOTIX Bootcamp 2026
programs.description: Welcome to AEROBOTIX Bootcamp 2026, an 8-day immersive technical learning experience organized by the Department of Student Research & Project, Student Welfare Wing, Lovely Professional University. This bootcamp is designed to provide students with practical exposure to Aerospace, Robotics, Drone Technology, and 3D Printing through hands-on learning, teamwork, and innovation-driven activities.
programs.cta_context: For groups that need a focused skill-building experience with a tailored learning plan.
programs.seats_note: Seats depend on the selected custom workshop cohort.

programs.name: LPU Immersion Program
programs.description: An immersive LPU experience for learners to explore campus life, academic pathways, culture, labs, and guided activities with a global outlook.
programs.cta_context: For students who want to experience the energy, scale, and possibilities of LPU up close.
programs.seats_note: Immersion seats are limited for a guided campus experience.
programs.included_services: Stay, food, campus experiences, and guided activities are included when this package is announced.

courses.name: Melody Time
courses.description: Children explore rhythm, song, and sound through guided musical activities. Builds listening skills and joyful self-expression.

courses.name: Day 1: The Grand Beginning
courses.description: Step into a world of innovation with an official kickoff and orientation. Explore our cutting-edge Robotics Labs and Library before diving into team-building and wellness sessions.

courses.name: Model Rocketry
courses.description: Students will learn: Basics of rocket science Aerodynamics & propulsion Rocket designing techniques Safe launch procedures Rocket assembly & testing

courses.name: Day 2: Creative Tech & Arts
courses.description: Master the future of design in our No-Code AI and Canva/UI workshops. Unleash your artistic side later with immersive music, dance, and theatre sessions.

courses.name: Stage Stars
courses.description: Kids step into characters, act out stories, and build confidence on stage. Develops communication, imagination, and teamwork.

courses.name: RC Plane & Drone Technology
courses.description: Students will explore: Principles of flight Drone components & controls RC aircraft operation Flight stability & maneuvering Practical flying sessions

courses.name: Day 3: Immersion 1 – Sports Engineering
courses.description: Get an inside look at the industry with Sports Engineering. Learn the mechanics behind top brands like Nivia, Spartan, and Shrey Sports.

courses.name: Robotics & 3D Printing
courses.description: Students will learn: Fundamentals of robotics Sensors & actuators Robot assembly & programming basics Introduction to CAD & 3D printing Prototype development

courses.name: Arts & Craft and Fashion Design
courses.description: Hands-on creative session where children craft, design, and decorate. Sparks creativity and fine motor development.

courses.name: Day 4: Hands-on Innovation
courses.description: Go under the hood in the Mechanical Teardown Lab and master 3D Printing and CAD basics. End the day exploring the intersection of art and culture.

courses.name: Day 5: Immersion 2 – Heavy Machinery
courses.description: Experience industrial power firsthand with Hero Cycles, Sonalika, Cremica, and Bonn. See how large-scale manufacturing moves the world.

courses.name: Smart Kids
courses.description: Interactive session building confidence, social skills, and positive habits. Children learn to communicate and carry themselves well.

courses.name: Little Chefs
courses.description: Children learn basics of food preparation and serving etiquette in a fun, supervised kitchen setting. Then enjoy a proper lunch together.

courses.name: Day 6: The Full-Day Hackathon
courses.description: It’s time for One Day Challenge 1! From kickoff to build to pitch, put your problem-solving skills to the ultimate test in this intense hackathon.

courses.name: Day 7: Reels & Relaxation
courses.description: Learn the art of digital storytelling in our Reel Making workshop and craft activities. Wind down with an inspiring movie night at the auditorium.

courses.name: Dance Beats
courses.description: High-energy dance session where kids groove to music, learn basic steps, and express themselves through movement. Great for fitness and fun.

courses.name: Day 8: One Day Challenge 2
courses.description: Feel the rush of a Reel Making Sprint and screening event. Create, edit, and showcase your best work in a high-energy competition.

courses.name: Aqua Fun
courses.description: Supervised swimming session in the indoor pool. Kids build water confidence and basic swimming skills under a trained coach.

courses.name: Day 9: Immersion 3 – Heritage & Logistics
courses.description: Journey through history and operations with a visit to the Golden Temple (Langar) and the Wagah Border. Witness the logistics of faith and national pride.

courses.name: Day 10: Junkyard Wars
courses.description: Turn "trash" into treasure in this Design Thinking Challenge. Use scrap materials to solve complex problems and build unique prototypes.

courses.name: Day 11: Shine On Stage
courses.description: Enhance your professional presence in our Personality Development Workshop. Take the stage for group role-plays and a fun Open Mic night.

courses.name: AI Tools & Emerging Technologies
courses.description: Get hands-on with today's most powerful AI tools, from generative AI to smart assistants, and the emerging tech shaping tomorrow.

courses.name: Day 12: Immersion 4 – Craftsmanship
courses.description: Discover the precision of modern manufacturing with Hawkins and Coca-Cola. Learn the secrets behind global bottling and craftsmanship.

courses.name: Farm, Food & Innovation
courses.description: Discover how food goes from farm to future: modern growing methods, food technology and hands-on agri-innovation projects.

courses.name: Day 13: Demo Day & Celebration
courses.description: The big stage! Present your hard work to HODs and the VC. Celebrate your success at the Farewell Gala and DJ Night.

courses.name: Idea to StartUp to Pitch to Funding
courses.description: The full founder journey in two weeks: shape an idea, build it into a startup plan, craft the pitch and learn how real funding works — ending in a Shark Tank-style pitch.

courses.name: Day 14: The LPU Advantage
courses.description: Plan your future with the LPU Advantage Seminar, covering LPUNEST and scholarships. Enjoy a final farewell lunch before departures.

courses.name: Fundamentals of IoT
courses.description: Build your first Internet of Things projects: connect sensors, read live data and control devices from the cloud.

courses.name: Art of Bread Making, Mocktails & Ice Cream
courses.description: Learn the basics of baking fresh bread, from dough preparation to shaping, proofing and baking.

courses.name: AEROBOTIX
courses.description: Dive into aerial robotics: build, program and fly drones while learning the engineering behind them.

courses.name: Web Development & Full Stack Technologies Lab
courses.description: Design and build real, interactive websites end-to-end, from front-end pages to back-end logic.

courses.name: Creative Textile Arts & Home Decor Product Design
courses.description: Design and craft your own textile art and home-decor products, from first concept to finished piece.

courses.name: Future Builders: Hands-on Engineering Workshop
courses.description: Design, prototype and build real engineering projects in this maker-style workshop for young innovators.

courses.name: Science Experiment
courses.description: A hands-on lab hour of fun, safe experiments that make physics, chemistry and biology click.

courses.name: Green Innovative Camp: Sustainable Practices
courses.description: Explore green technology and sustainable engineering through hands-on, eco-friendly innovation challenges.

courses.name: Create, Design, Draw : Introduction to CAD for Future Engineers
courses.description: Master industry-standard AutoCAD to create precise 2D drawings and 3D models from scratch.

courses.name: Paperverse: A World Made of Paper
courses.description: Explore the art of paper through origami, quilling and sculpture to build a whole world from a single sheet.

courses.name: Hydroponics: Soilless Culture (Advanced)
courses.description: Take hydroponics further with nutrient management, system design and scaling up your soilless garden.

courses.name: Future Engineers Bootcamp: Design, Build & Innovate
courses.description: An intensive bootcamp where you take an engineering idea from design and build all the way to a working prototype.

courses.name: Mobile Photography & Editing
courses.description: Turn your phone into a creative studio with composition, lighting and pro-level editing for standout photos.

courses.name: Personality Development
courses.description: Daily confidence training: public speaking, body language, interviews and presenting yourself with impact.

courses.name: JunkGenie
courses.description: Upcycle everyday waste into imaginative art and useful products in this hands-on sustainability-meets-creativity workshop.

courses.name: Art & Culture or Sports
courses.description: Wind down every day your way: art and cultural activities, or coached sports on LPU's grounds.

site_config.value: Jalandhar - Delhi G.T. Road, Phagwara, Punjab, India - 144411

gallery_images.alt_text: Sports activity at LPU Summer School
